required_skills: Experience in training clients through functional training techniques
Must have the ability to progress and regress exercises on the fly in real time
motivating and effective interpersonal communication skills
Must have the desire and capacity to train all fitness levels
Must hold a current fitness certification from an OTF approved education company
education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in an exercise related field is preferred.
compensation_benefits: long-term & short-term disability and life insurance options
Free OTF membership and discounts on merchandise & apparel
